case_title: WINDSOR HOTEL vs. RIOS, CHRISTINE et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT SERVED MAY-05-1996, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RIOS, CHRISTINE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINDSOR HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT RIOS, CHRISTINE TOM, WILLIS DOES 1 TO 15 SUMMONS ISSUED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $10.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINDSOR HOTEL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WINDSOR HOTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIOS, CHRISTINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 238 EDDY ST #206, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES PER C.C.P. 415.46.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $10.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINDSOR HOTEL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT RIOS, CHRISTINE
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL, DECLARATION GRANTED - 2 - QUIDACHAY. THE DISMISSAL OF THE ABOVE- ENTITLED CASE IS VACATED. THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED AGAINST CHRISTINE RIOS. THE BALANCE OF THE ACTION AGAINST WILLIS TOM SHALL BE DISMISSED, WITH PREJUDICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINDSOR HOTEL DISMISSAL OF MAY-15-1996 SET ASIDE
PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR AN ORDER SHORTENING TIME - GRANTED - DEPT. 2 - QUIDACHAY. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINDSOR HOTEL
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RIOS, CHRISTINE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINDSOR HOTEL SERVED MAY-06-1996, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT RIOS, CHRISTINE
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT PER COURT ORDER OF DEPT. 2 - JUDGE QUIDACHAY. AS TO DEFENDANT TOM, WILLIS
